channel.title: Authors on Root 2 Fork
channel.description: Recent content in Authors on Root 2 Fork

item.description: We are a team of environmental scientists dedicated to making sense of your environmental data and solving data driven environmental questions. With our combined expertise in remote sensing, ecological modelling, field surveys, tropical ecology and agroforestry, data science (ML/AI) & data rescue we can provide end-to-end research & development solutions. We help you effectively communicate research results, reaching both professional and general audiences.
